title: AccessShulker
description: Hold shulker in hand - right click to open it!
body:
# AccessShulker
Required Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlinplugins
- Allows to open shulker by right clicking while holding them in main-hand.
- The purpose of this plugin is to introduce life quality improvement for the players. 
- Check out other plugins: https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps
